A JSON file listing codepoints for the Russian language block, with a note on font inclusion.

# Purpose
This JSON file defines a list of Unicode code points that represent characters in the Russian block. The `notes` field provides a comment indicating that these code points cover the entire Russian block, but not all are included in the associated font. The `codepoints` array contains a sequence of integers, each corresponding to a specific character in the Unicode standard for the Russian language. This file is relevant to the codebase as it specifies which characters are supported or intended to be supported by a particular font or text rendering system. It serves as a reference for developers to understand the scope of character support within the application.
# Content Summary
This JSON file contains metadata related to a set of Unicode code points. The key "notes" provides a description indicating that the code points listed cover the entire Russian block, but not all of these code points are included in the font. The "codepoints" key is associated with an array of integers. These integers represent the Unicode code points for characters in the Russian block, ranging from 1024 to 1278. This information is important for developers who need to understand which specific characters are supported by the font in use, especially when dealing with Russian text. The file helps in identifying the range of characters that are intended to be supported, even if the font does not include all of them.
